channel.title: MITRE Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by MITRE Corporation (mitre).

item.title: CVE-2026-57589 · 7.4 HIGH
item.description: sys/kern/sysv_sem.c in OpenBSD through 7.9 has a use-after-free allowing local privilege escalation to root. This is a context switch use-after-free after tsleep in sys_semget().

item.title: CVE-2026-49269 🤔
item.description: Apple M1 GPUs retain register file data between compute shader dispatches from different processes. A sandboxed Metal attacker app can run a GPU reader shader that reads stale register values left by a separate sandboxed victim app. In the proof of c…

item.title: CVE-2025-60474 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A buffer overflow in the gf_media_import function (/media_tools/av_parsers.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted input.

item.title: CVE-2025-60473
item.description: A NULL pointer dereference in the gf_filter_in_parent_chain function (/filter_core/filter_pid.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted file.

item.title: CVE-2025-60471 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: A use-after-free in the gf_filter_pid_reconfigure_task_discard function (/filter_core/filter_pid.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted media file.

item.title: CVE-2025-60468 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: GPAC Multimedia Open Source Project GPAC Project/MP4Box 2.5-DEV-rev1593-gfe88c3545-master is affected by: Buffer Overflow. The impact is: cause a denial of service (local). The component is: filter_core/filter_pid.c (L:574-580): function gf_filter_pi…

item.title: CVE-2025-60467 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free in the gf_filter_pid_inst_swap_delete_task function (/filter_core/filter_pid.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted media file.

item.title: CVE-2025-60466
item.description: A use-after-free in the gf_filter_pid_get_packet function (/filter_core/filter_pid.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted media file.

item.title: CVE-2026-57062 · 2.9 LOW
item.description: CMS (Cryptographic Message Syntax) parsing in gpgsm in GnuPG through 2.5.20 mishandles the CMS format for AES-GCM because aes-ICVlen is supposed to be 12 bytes but 4 bytes is accepted. NOTE: this is related to CVE-2026-34182.

item.title: CVE-2026-50221 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In OpenStack Swift before 2.37.2, proxy-server does not strip internal update headers (X-Container-Host, X-Container-Device, X-Delete-At-Host, X-Delete-At-Device) from client requests before forwarding them to object-servers. An authenticated user wi…

item.title: CVE-2026-57053 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: GNU libidn before 1.44 is prone to out-of-bounds reads of uninitialized memory in the ToUnicode APIs because of mishandling in idna_to_unicode_internal. The affected code is not present in libidn2.

item.title: CVE-2026-56968 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️
item.description: GNU SASL before 2.2.4 lacks sanitization of a short challenge in _gsasl_ntlm_client_step in the NTLM client, which could result in memory disclosure via a crafted server.

item.title: CVE-2026-56815 · 7.4 HIGH
item.description: pwnlift before d7a9544, in a privileged deployment, contains a symlink following vulnerability in the upload handler in Components/Pages/Home.razor.

item.title: CVE-2026-52673
item.description: SQL Injection vulnerability in Cboard v.0.4.2 and before allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the getDimensionsValues component

item.title: CVE-2026-39253 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in Pivotal CRM v.6.6.04.08 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the Pivotal.Core.Common.dll and Pivotal.Engine.Client.Services.Conversion.dll components.

item.title: CVE-2025-61029 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in the sqlo_untry component of openlink virtuoso-opensource v7.2.11 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via crafted SQL statements.

item.title: CVE-2025-61025 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in the sslr_qst_get component of openlink virtuoso-opensource v7.2.11 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via crafted SQL statements.

item.title: CVE-2025-61024 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in the sqlo_try_in_loop component of openlink virtuoso-opensource v7.2.11 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via crafted SQL statements.

item.title: CVE-2025-61022 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in the sqlo_tb_col_preds component of openlink virtuoso-opensource v7.2.11 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via crafted SQL statements.

item.title: CVE-2025-61020 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in the sqlo_strip_in_join component of openlink virtuoso-opensource v7.2.11 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via crafted SQL statements.

item.title: CVE-2025-61018 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in the sqlo_place_dt_set component of openlink virtuoso-opensource v7.2.11 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via crafted SQL statements.

item.title: CVE-2025-55639 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: GPAC MP4Box v2.4 was discovered to contain a NULL pointer dereference in the gf_isom_add_track_kind() function at isomedia/isom_write.c. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted MP4 file.

item.title: CVE-2025-66389 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: GitHub Copilot 1.372.0 allows filesystem access outside of a workspace folder (without user approval) via a file-handler URI parameter to fetch_webpage. Therefore, exfiltration could occur if there is indirect prompt injection.

item.title: CVE-2026-56412 · 4.9 MEDIUM
item.description: libexpat before 2.8.2 does not consider XML_TOK_DATA_CHARS in doCdataSection and thus lacks handler call depth tracking for various calls from within handlers in cases of a policy violation. Thus, a use-after-free can occur. NOTE: this issue exists b…

item.title: CVE-2026-56411 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: xmlwf in libexpat before 2.8.2 has an integer overflow in endDoctypeDecl via NOTATION declarations.

item.title: CVE-2026-56410 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: xmlwf in libexpat before 2.8.2 has an integer overflow in resolveSystemId.

item.title: CVE-2026-56409 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: xmlwf in libexpat before 2.8.2 has an integer overflow for the output filename when -d outputDir is used.

item.title: CVE-2026-56408 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: libexpat before 2.8.2 has an integer overflow in copyString.

item.title: CVE-2026-56407 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: libexpat before 2.8.2 has an integer overflow in doProlog that is related to storeEntityValue and entity textLen.

item.title: CVE-2026-56406 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: libexpat before 2.8.2 has an integer overflow in XML_ParseBuffer because it lacked a check that was present in XML_Parse.

item.title: CVE-2026-56405 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: libexpat before 2.8.2 has an integer overflow in getAttributeId.

item.title: CVE-2026-56404 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: libexpat before 2.8.2 has an integer overflow in addBinding.

item.title: CVE-2026-56403 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: libexpat before 2.8.2 has an integer overflow in storeAtts.

item.title: CVE-2026-56355 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️
item.description: GNU Savannah Administration Savane through 3.17 uses untrusted data as part of authorization.

item.title: CVE-2026-56132 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: In libexpat before 2.8.2, there is a heap-based buffer overflow in doProlog in xmlparse.c because scaffold backing array reallocation is mishandled when there is data-structure sharing across parsers.

item.title: CVE-2026-56131 · 4.9 MEDIUM
item.description: libexpat before 2.8.2 lacks handler call depth tracking for calls to XML_ResumeParser from within handlers in cases of a policy violation. Thus, a use-after-free can occur (similar to the CVE-2026-50219 situation).

item.title: CVE-2026-51846 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In Tenda AC7 v15.03.06.44, the wanSpeed parameter of the route /goform/AdvSetMacMtuWan has a stack buffer overflow vulnerability that can lead to remote arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2026-51845 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Tenda AC7 v15.03.06.44 contains a stack buffer overflow vulnerability in the /goform/AdvSetMacMtuWan interface via the mac parameter.

item.title: CVE-2026-51844 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Tenda AC7 v15.03.06.44 contains a stack buffer overflow vulnerability in the /goform/AdvSetMacMtuWan interface via the cloneType parameter.

item.title: CVE-2026-51843 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Tenda AC7 v15.03.06.44 contains a stack buffer overflow vulnerability in the /goform/AdvSetMacMtuWan interface via the wanMTU parameter.

item.title: CVE-2025-62821 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Microsoft HEIF Image Extensions 1.2.22.0 has an out-of-bounds read because CHEIFItemInfoEntry_GetDataSize can return success while leaving the reported data size as 0. This causes a caller to make a 1-byte allocation. Later, CopyPixels computes copy_…

item.title: CVE-2026-38718 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: InHand Networks IR912 V1.0.0.r20042 and IR915 V1.0.0.r20042 (including earlier versions) were discovered to contain a buffer overflow vulnerability in the device registration function. This vulnerability could allow an attacker to cause a denial of s…

item.title: CVE-2026-38717 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: InHand Networks IR912 V1.0.0.r20042 and IR915 V1.0.0.r20042 (including earlier versions) were discovered to contain a command injection vulnerability in the file upload function. The vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands…

item.title: CVE-2026-38716 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: InHand Networks IR912 V1.0.0.r20042 and IR915 V1.0.0.r20042 (including earlier versions) were discovered to contain a command injection vulnerability in the Python application export function. This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arb…

item.title: CVE-2026-38715 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: InHand Networks IR912 V1.0.0.r20042 and IR915 V1.0.0.r20042 (including earlier versions) were discovered to contain a command injection vulnerability in the log viewing function. This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary command…

item.title: CVE-2026-38714 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: InHand Networks IR912 V1.0.0.r20042 and IR915 V1.0.0.r20042 (including earlier versions) were discovered to contain a command injection vulnerability in the Python configuration function. This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrar…

item.title: CVE-2026-55748 · 6 MEDIUM
item.description: OpenStack Horizon before 25.7.4 produces scripts for OpenStack RC file downloading that may have a crafted project name with shell metacharacters. NOTE: some parties consider this a security hardening opportunity to address certain types of user erro…

item.title: CVE-2026-39199 · 2.9 LOW
item.description: snes9x 1.63 allows an out-of-bounds write and denial of service via a crafted .ups file.

item.title: CVE-2026-36418 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: JimuReport versions 2.3.4 and below are vulnerable to remote code execution due to improper handling of Aviator expressions. The /jmreport/executeSelectApi endpoint passes user-supplied input directly to the Aviator expression engine without adequate…

item.title: CVE-2025-66391
item.description: In Citrix Cloud through 2025-11-10, an account with read-only access can trigger the beginning of a workflow for write operations, e.g., the system will send a one-time password to an attacker-controlled email address when the attacker attempts to re…
